description: A supplier has issued a recall for a product due to a safety issue. An agent must notify all retailers who purchased the product.

nodes.task_description: Receive the recall notice from the supplier.

expected_outcome.value: Agent has the details of the recall, including the affected product and batch numbers.

nodes.task_description: Generate a list of all customers who purchased the recalled product.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a list of all affected retailers.

nodes.task_description: Send a recall notification to all affected customers with instructions on how to return the product.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully sends the recall notices.

nodes.task_description: Flag the product in the system to prevent any further sales.

expected_outcome.value: The product is marked as 'recalled' and cannot be sold.
